conversationHistory.content: My kitchen drain is slow
Hi Mike, thanks for reaching out to Calgary Drain Pros! A slow kitchen drain is usually a quick fix. I can get Dave's team out to clear it up. When works best for you?
ill think about it
our hot water tank is 15 years old and starting to leak a bit
Hi Sandra, a 15-year-old tank that's leaking is a sign it needs replacing soon. Kevin can get you set up with a new unit. Want to schedule a quick assessment?
maybe. what brands do you carry?
We carry Bradford White and Rheem - both great for Calgary's water conditions. Kevin recommends Bradford White for longevity. Can I book a time to show you your options in person?
need a new furnace. mine died
Hi Trevor, sorry to hear that - especially with Calgary winters! Greg and the Summit HVAC team can get you sorted quickly. Are you without heat right now?
yeah but we have space heaters. got a few quotes already just comparing
got some hail damage on my roof from last month's storm
Hi Amber! Hail damage needs to be addressed before the next rain season hits. Lyle's team at Prairie Roofing does free assessments and can work with your insurance. Want to schedule an inspection?
still waiting on my insurance adjuster to come out first
circuit breaker keeps tripping. think i need a panel upgrade
Hi Dan, a tripping breaker is a sign your panel might be overloaded - especially common in older Calgary homes. Rob can do a free panel assessment. When can we come take a look?
not sure yet. maybe after the holidays
there's a gurgling sound from my basement drain when I flush
Hi Carla, gurgling usually means a partial blockage in the sewer line. Dave's team can camera-inspect your line to see exactly what's going on. Can we book you in?
not right now, maybe later
No problem! Just checking in - has the gurgling gotten any better or worse? These things can turn into bigger issues if left too long.
finishing my basement and need a bathroom roughed in
Great project Jason! Kevin's team does basement bathroom rough-ins regularly. It's best to get plumbing done before the walls go up. When does your build start?
prolly next spring
Smart to plan ahead! Spring books up fast. Want me to put you on the schedule now so you get your preferred dates?
nah ill reach out when im ready
looking to get central AC installed before summer
Perfect timing Maria! Greg's team is booking AC installs now. We also offer financing if that helps. Want a free quote at your place?
ill have to check with my husband first
Of course! When you both have a chance to chat, just let me know and I can have Greg call you directly to answer any questions.
my roof is old and I know it needs replacing eventually
Hi Bill! Lyle would be happy to do a free inspection to give you a current assessment and a no-pressure quote. Catching it before it leaks saves a lot of grief. When can we take a look?
not yet. saving up a bit first
Totally understand. We do offer financing options too if that helps spread the cost. Just wanted to mention it.
just got a Tesla and need a level 2 charger installed in my garage
Congrats on the Tesla! Rob's team installs EV chargers all the time - usually a half-day job. We also handle the permit. Want to get on the schedule?
yeah was getting a couple quotes. yours felt high tbh
I hear you on the price. Want me to have Rob call you to walk through exactly what's included? Sometimes the quotes aren't apples-to-apples.
